description_long: This is a large, rectangular, industrial bag of cement labeled 'Eurocement 500 Extra', designed for construction use. The bag is primarily white with a prominent orange top section, and features bold black and green text in both Russian and English. The front displays the Eurocement logo, weight (50 kg), and product details, while the back is densely covered with technical specifications, handling instructions, and a large contact number. The sides are narrow, showing the product name and logo vertically, with color bands at the top and bottom. The packaging appears to be made of a durable, multi-layered paper or plastic composite, suitable for containing heavy powdered material. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with clear branding and functional labeling for industrial or commercial environments.
description: A large, rectangular industrial bag of Eurocement 500 Extra, white with orange and green accents, featuring bold branding and technical labeling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical Eurocement 500 Extra label and orange top band.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the Eurocement logo, product name, weight (50 kg), and green slogan.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, nearly identical to view 0, with vertical product labeling.
description_view_3: Back view with dense technical information, handling icons, barcode, and a large contact number.
